identity.name: Old Thorn
identity.story: Grew around a castle for a hundred years. Prunes himself now, out of respect for the neighbors.

relationships.kind: grew a hundred years of wall around her without meaning a word of it; the arch was always going to let her out eventually

behavior.label: Old Thorn's arch, finally his height

child.label: lending his roots to a hedge that's finally his height

children.label: walking the last time to a plot that isn't marked anymore
standing in the archway, finished, the way a hedge stands anywhere

child.label: keeping the arch honest now that it stands

children.label: returning to the arch, same as ever, only shorter walk now
holding still for the Princess's thanks, roses and all, same as every high sun since the wall came down

child.label: redirecting lost travelers under the arch instead of around it
standing very still, but meaningfully, under something that finally stands with him
